subject: Nosepass, the Compass Pokemon — a squat, blocky blue-gray rock creature with a prominent large red nose, small dark eyes, and stubby arms, standing on grassy terrain
description: Nosepass stands centered in the frame on a patch of grassy ground. Its body is compact and roughly trapezoidal — blue-gray in color, resembling hewn stone. The defining feature is its oversized round red nose at the center of its face, which serves as a compass pointer in lore. Small dark eyes sit above the nose, and short stubby arms extend from its sides. The background is a warm golden-yellow suggesting sunlit open air, with loose stones and tufts of grass visible at the creature's feet. The illustration is simple and character-focused, rendered in a soft but grounded style.
foreground: Nosepass standing on grassy rocky ground
background: warm golden-yellow open air with rocks and grass
emotion: neutral, steady presence — stoic and grounded body language
